mapper.select: select cast(checkout_time as date) time,count(*) from orders where cast(checkout_time as date) between #{begin} and #{end} group by time
select cast(checkout_time as date) time,count(*) from orders where cast(checkout_time as date) between #{begin} and #{end} and status = 5 group by time
select name, count(name) number from orders o left join order_detail od on o.id=od.order_id where status=#{status} and cast(checkout_time as date) between #{begin} and #{end} group by name;
